title: Hand Towels Pack of 3 – Luxury 450 GSM Towels with Quick Drying Absorbent Finish, Soft Egyptian Cotton Fabric (White, Hand Towel 50 x 70 cm)
features: MATERIAL: Made from 100% premium egyptian cotton for exceptional softness, strength, and absorbency.
GREEK KEY BORDER: Timeless Greek design adds a refined, decorative touch to elevate any bathroom style.
3-PACK VALUE: Includes three matching 50X70 cm hand towels perfect for daily use, guests, or gift sets.
SUPERIOR ABSORBENCY: Dense, long-staple cotton fibers quickly wick away moisture while remaining gentle on the skin.
EASY CARE: Machine washable for convenient cleaning. Do not bleach. Keep away from fire. No ironing required to maintain softness and shape.
description: GREEK KEY PATTERN TOWEL BATH SHEETS EXTRA LARGE ★ The luxury egyptian cotton towels are super-soft material feels luxuriously smooth against your skin, ideal for helping you keep warm and dry off in comfort after your cleansing routine ★ These Extra Large Bath Sheets are Dry off quickly and efficiently with these stunning towels, expertly designed to soak up moisture in addition to looking fabulous in your home! ★ These Quick Dry Towel Sets are Created from high-quality, machine washable fabric, these fabulous towels could not be simpler to care for in the convenience of your own home ★ Whatever your bathroom looks like, you can find the perfect shade to match from among our exquisite Greek Towels. ★ Material Composition: 100% Cotton ★ Available Sizes: Bath Sheet: 90 cm x 150 cm (Sold Separately) Jumbo Bath Sheet: 90 cm x 180 (Sold Separately) ★ Available Colours: White, Grey, Charcoal, Black, ★ Caring Instructions: Machine washable at 40° C Wash Dark Colors Separately Do Not Bleach Keep Away From Fire Do Not Iron ★ Brand: Cotton Bliss Note: All Photographs are for illustration purposes only. Actual colours may slightly vary from the pictures.
